home.metaTitle: Mintzo — dictation and transcription in Basque and French
home.metaDescription: System-wide dictation on Mac, 100% local, and online audio transcription. In Basque and French, free and open source.
home.tagline: Dictation and transcription, in Basque and in French.
home.sub: On Mac, 100% local. Online, transcribed on our server — audio is never kept.
home.b1Body: Press a key, speak, and the corrected text lands at your cursor — in any application.
home.b2Body: Drop a WhatsApp voice message (.opus), a voice memo (.m4a) or an .mp3 into the browser: it comes back transcribed and corrected.
home.b3Body: On the Mac, everything happens locally: audio never leaves your machine. Online, it is transcribed on our server and deleted right away — we keep nothing.
home.how2Desc: Whisper large-v3, fine-tuned for Basque — whisper.cpp.
home.how3Desc: Latxa fixes spelling, punctuation and capitalisation, without changing the meaning — llama.cpp.
home.macStatus: In active development. No downloadable build yet: it can be built from source.
home.macBody: You need an Apple Silicon Mac, macOS 15 or later, and Xcode 26.
home.creditsIntro: Mintzo is built on the work of the Basque language-technology community.
home.creditHitzDesc: creator of the Latxa language models; Latxa is the heart of the correction pass.
home.creditCvDesc: a free corpus built from volunteers’ voices — the foundation of Basque voice technology. You can help too.
home.creditGgmlDesc: the engines that make inference possible (MIT).

tool.metaDescription: Upload an audio file, get the text back, in Basque or French. Audio is deleted right away; nothing is kept.
tool.emptySub: or choose a file from your computer
tool.dropAria: Drop an audio file here to transcribe it, or press to choose a file
tool.historyNote: History is kept in your browser only.
tool.errTooBig: The file is too large — 50 MB maximum.
tool.errFormat: That format can’t be read. Use an audio file (.opus, .m4a, .mp3, .wav…).
tool.errServer: The service may be paused right now. Try again in a moment.
tool.errTimeout: It took too long. Try again.

privacy.metaDescription: What is sent, what is deleted, what we never keep. Short and true.
privacy.title: Privacy
privacy.s1P1: When you use the tool, your audio file is sent to our transcription server — and nowhere else — along with the chosen language and the correction option.
privacy.s1P2: The server returns the transcription, then deletes the audio immediately. We keep neither the audio nor the text; there is no account, no log containing your content.
privacy.s2P1: The transcription history is stored in your browser only (IndexedDB). It is never sent to our servers, and you can erase it at any time, from the tool page itself.
privacy.s3P1: This site uses no cookies, no analytics, no third-party services: fonts included, everything is served from our domain. There are no ads, and we do not measure your browsing.
privacy.s4P1: In the Mac app, everything happens locally: audio never leaves your Mac. Once the models are downloaded, it works offline.
